hooks.command: sh -c 'r=${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}; b=${r%/*}; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then v=${r##*/}; case "$v" in [0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*) if [ ! -e "$b/current" ] || [ -L "$b/current" ]; then ln -sfn "$v" "$b/current" 2>/dev/null || :; fi ;; esac; fi; x="$b/current/bin/agent-guard"; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -n "$r" ]; then x=$(for c in "$b"/[0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*/bin/agent-guard; do [ -x "$c" ] || continue; v=${c%/bin/agent-guard}; printf "%s\\t%s\\n" "${v##*/}" "$c"; done | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -n 1 | cut -f 2-); fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then x="$r/bin/agent-guard"; fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ]; then echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set or no installed binary was found; continuing because AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE=open (the default)" >&2; [ "${AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE:-open}" = closed ] && exit 2; exit 0; fi; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "$x" hook-pre-tool'

sh -c 'r=${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}; b=${r%/*}; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then v=${r##*/}; case "$v" in [0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*) if [ ! -e "$b/current" ] || [ -L "$b/current" ]; then ln -sfn "$v" "$b/current" 2>/dev/null || :; fi ;; esac; fi; x="$b/current/bin/agent-guard"; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -n "$r" ]; then x=$(for c in "$b"/[0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*/bin/agent-guard; do [ -x "$c" ] || continue; v=${c%/bin/agent-guard}; printf "%s\\t%s\\n" "${v##*/}" "$c"; done | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -n 1 | cut -f 2-); fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then x="$r/bin/agent-guard"; fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ]; then echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set or no installed binary was found; continuing because AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE=open (the default)" >&2; [ "${AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE:-open}" = closed ] && exit 2; exit 0; fi; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "$x" hook-post-tool'

sh -c 'r=${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}; b=${r%/*}; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then v=${r##*/}; case "$v" in [0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*) if [ ! -e "$b/current" ] || [ -L "$b/current" ]; then ln -sfn "$v" "$b/current" 2>/dev/null || :; fi ;; esac; fi; x="$b/current/bin/agent-guard"; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -n "$r" ]; then x=$(for c in "$b"/[0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*/bin/agent-guard; do [ -x "$c" ] || continue; v=${c%/bin/agent-guard}; printf "%s\\t%s\\n" "${v##*/}" "$c"; done | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -n 1 | cut -f 2-); fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then x="$r/bin/agent-guard"; fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ]; then echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set or no installed binary was found; continuing because AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE=open (the default)" >&2; [ "${AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE:-open}" = closed ] && exit 2; exit 0; fi; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "$x" hook-stop'

sh -c 'r=${PLUGIN_ROOT:-}; b=${r%/*}; if [ -n "$r" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then v=${r##*/}; case "$v" in [0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*) if [ ! -e "$b/current" ] || [ -L "$b/current" ]; then ln -sfn "$v" "$b/current" 2>/dev/null || :; fi ;; esac; fi; x="$b/current/bin/agent-guard"; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -n "$r" ]; then x=$(for c in "$b"/[0-9]*.[0-9]*.[0-9]*/bin/agent-guard; do [ -x "$c" ] || continue; v=${c%/bin/agent-guard}; printf "%s\\t%s\\n" "${v##*/}" "$c"; done | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n | tail -n 1 | cut -f 2-); fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ] && [ -x "$r/bin/agent-guard" ]; then x="$r/bin/agent-guard"; fi; if [ ! -x "$x" ]; then echo "agent-guard: PLUGIN_ROOT env not set or no installed binary was found; continuing because AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE=open (the default)" >&2; [ "${AGENT_GUARD_INFRA_FAILURE_MODE:-open}" = closed ] && exit 2; exit 0; fi; AGENT_GUARD_HOOK_HOST=codex "$x" hook-session-start'
